provider: HKUST 2025/26 BEng in Industrial Engineering and Engineering Management Major Requirements
note: This cohort-specific supplement binds the official 2025-26 IEEM Major Requirements to the current BEng in Industrial Engineering and Engineering Management Major. It records every coded Engineering Fundamental alternative, Required Course, bounded 21-credit Industrial Engineering elective list, and both optional Options. IEDA 4000 has an official 1-3 credit range and therefore uses credits 0 locally; completion must use the credits actually attained. Students may graduate without an Option. The Financial Engineering Option requires CGA 3.0 or above, IEDA 3330, and two courses totaling at least 6 credits from its four-course list. The Research Option requires IEDA 4901 for the Major project alternative plus two advisor-approved courses totaling at least 6 credits from its three-course list. No Year or semester is inferred because the linked department pathway does not publish a machine-stable coded placement table for this cohort. University Common Core, English, Legal Education, and additional electives used to reach 120 credits remain outside this Programme-local supplement.
